title: Nomura Launches $50B Emerging Markets Investment Platform
content: Nomura Inc. announced the launch of its comprehensive Emerging Markets investment platform, combining equity, fixed income, and derivative strategies. This platform targets institutional investors seeking diversified exposure to high-growth markets. The initiative reflects Nomura's commitment to capturing opportunities across emerging economies worldwide.

title: Nomura Reports Record Trading Volumes in Q1 2026
content: Nomura achieved record trading volumes across equities, fixed income, and derivatives during the first quarter of 2026. Strong client engagement and market activity drove exceptional performance across all major asset classes. This success demonstrates the strength of Nomura's global trading capabilities and client relationships.

title: Nomura Establishes New Asia-Pacific Innovation Hub
content: Nomura opened a new innovation hub in Hong Kong to accelerate fintech development and digital transformation. The hub will focus on artificial intelligence, machine learning, and blockchain technologies to enhance investment capabilities. This investment underscores Nomura's dedication to technology-driven solutions for the financial industry.
